title: MineHack Pack
description: Minecraft mod pack created for 1.20 that is remonisant of minecraft during its golden age of modding during 1.12. Focusing on adding mods for gameplay, mobs, world gen, and fun.
body: Minecraft mod pack created for 1.20 that is remonisant of minecraft during its golden age of modding during 1.12. Focusing on adding mods for gameplay, mobs, world gen, and fun. Major animation mods and multiplayer functinality mods are not added in order to reduce lag for servers and keep minecraft focused on the gameplay rather than looks.
